---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Selected engagements: statistical analyses, predictive modeling, and interactive applications."
body-classes: "ed-page"
listing:
  contents: "**/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: long
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 30
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    page-layout: article
ai-summary:
  banner-title: "Yapper Labs | AI Summary"
  model-title: "Model: ChatGPT 4.5"
  model-img: "/images/openai-white-monoblossom.svg"
  summary: "A short, focused selection: a multivariate analysis of wine quality, a Shiny dashboard for UK traffic-accident data, and a Yelp business-review explorer. Older project work — predictive models, healthcare analyses, the Olympic dashboard — is preserved under the site's Archive."
---
